title: View Runway Slot Timetable
description: The system shall display a slot timetable per runway showing all allocated time slots, flight details, and status.
rationale: This requirement is necessary for air traffic controllers to monitor and manage runway utilization efficiently and effectively.
business_value: Improved operational efficiency and safety through quick access to runway usage data.

source.description: As a air traffic controller, I need to view a slot timetable per runway showing all allocated time slots, flight details, and status so that I can monitor and manage runway utilization at a glance.

acceptance_criteria: The system should display a slot timetable showing allocated time slots, flight details, and status for the selected runway.
preconditions: The user must be logged into the runway management system.
The specific runway must have allocated time slots, flight details, and statuses to display.
postconditions: The user should see a slot timetable with all necessary information for the selected runway.
functional_constraints: Data must be displayed in real-time or near real-time.
The system must handle multiple runways simultaneously without performance degradation.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system should respond within 2 seconds for each runway timetable request.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system should support up to 100 runways and handle at least 50 requests per minute.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages must be clear and user-friendly.

edge_cases: What happens if no time slots are allocated for a runway?
How will the system handle data updates in real-time during flight operations?
What is the behavior of the system when multiple runways have overlapping time slots?

interfaces.name: Runway API
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Runway API to fetch runway data, including time slots, flight details, and statuses.

interfaces.name: Flight Database
interfaces.description: The system retrieves flight details from the Flight Database to populate the timetable.

interfaces.name: Runway Timetable UI
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Runway Timetable UI to display the slot timetable to air traffic controllers.

test_cases.description: Verify that the system displays a slot timetable for a runway with allocated time slots.
test_cases.expected_result: The user should see a slot timetable showing all allocated time slots, flight details, and statuses for the selected runway.

test_cases.description: Test the system's response when no time slots are allocated for a runway.
test_cases.expected_result: The system should display an empty timetable or a message indicating that there are no time slots available for the selected runway.

test_cases.description: Check the system's ability to handle real-time data updates during flight operations.
test_cases.expected_result: The user should see updated time slots, flight details, and statuses in the timetable as they occur.
